zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France於1092年11月18日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安時，她的父親Humbert II de Savoie26歲，母親Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté18歲。她於1115年8月3日與Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1154年11月18日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年62歲，埋葬在法國薩伏伊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France于1092年11月18日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安时，她的父亲Humbert II de Savoie26岁，母亲Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté18岁。她于1115年8月3日与Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1154年11月18日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年62岁，埋葬在法国薩伏伊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France was born on 18 November 1092, in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Humbert II de Savoie, was 26 and her mother, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, was 18. She married Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs on 3 August 1115, in Archdiocese of Paris, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 November 1154, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Savoie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France est née le 18 novembre 1092, à Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert II de Savoie, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs le 3 août 1115, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 novembre 1154, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Savoie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France am 18. November 1092 in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humbert II de Savoie 26 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté 18. Sie hat am 3. August 1115 in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. November 1154 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Savoyen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France è nata il il 18 novembre 1092 nel Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Humbert II de Savoie, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs il 3 agosto 1115, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 novembre 1154, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Savoia, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de Franceが1092年11月18日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-ジェアン-デ-マアウリーンで生まれた時，父Humbert II de Savoieは26歳，母Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéは18歳であった。1115年8月3日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスでLouis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1154年11月18日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで62歳で死去し，フランスサボイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France(이)가 1092년 11월 18일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-제이이-데-모리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humbert II de Savoie(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1115년 8월 3일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 11월 18일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 서아보이에 묻혔다.

mn.18 November 1092–18 November 1154: 1092 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 18–1154 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 18

pt.18 November 1092–18 November 1154: 18 de novembro de 1092–18 de novembro de 1154
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France nasceu em 18 de novembro de 1092, em Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert II de Savoie, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs em 3 de agosto de 1115, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1154, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Savoie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France родилась 18 ноября 1092 г. в местности сеинт-джин-де-мауриенн, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Humbert II de Savoie было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs 3 августа 1115 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 ноября 1154 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности савои, Франция.

es.18 November 1092–18 November 1154: 18 de noviembre de 1092–18 de noviembre de 1154
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France nació el 18 de noviembre de 1092, en Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Humbert II de Savoie, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs el 3 de agosto de 1115, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1154, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Savoie, Francia.
